_comment: User asset catalog, deep-merged over the built-in curated set (src/zymera/registry/catalog.py). Add your own checkpoints, LoRAs, and adapters here. Sources: 'hf' (needs 'repo', optional 'weight_name') or 'civitai' (needs 'model_id', optional 'version_id'). Set 'family' to 'sdxl' or 'sd15' so the planner only pairs compatible LoRAs with a base model. The content-policy gate ALWAYS blocks real-person assets (real_person/poi); NSFW entries require registry.content_mode=nsfw.
